name: litedbmodel/runtime
description: litedbmodel v2 SCP PHP runtime — interprets the language-neutral §8 published bundle (SqlBundle: sql + fragment tree + Expression-IR param slots + transaction plan, dialect-tagged) and executes it against a PDO SQL driver. Semantics-identical to the TS reference. The behavior-contracts Expression-IR evaluator is VENDORED (see README) since the bc PHP port is not published.
